topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules that automate the control of smart devices based on the user's location, primarily focusing on turning devices on or off when entering or leaving specific areas.

rows.if_then_rule: IF You exit an area from Location THEN Turn off using WeMo Smart Plug.
